notes: Silhouette roughly tracks the photo's pose with mantle, fins, arms, and two long tentacles in correct positions, but the rendering reads as a faint edge-trace rather than confident FAO ink work.
specific_issues: linework is faint, broken, and inconsistent rather than single-weight black ink
silhouette edges show jagged edge-detection artifacts instead of clean continuous contour
no almond eye with filled pupil drawn at the photo's eye position
no ring-shaped suckers along the arms or tentacular clubs
stipple is scattered randomly across the mantle instead of concentrated in the photo's chromatophore/shadow bands
fin outline lacks the smooth rhomboid curve seen in the photo
tentacular club tips lack defined sucker detail
overall image lacks the confident scientific-plate restraint of the FAO references
